manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Please help me with the following task. The goal is to visit all the rooms with the fewest number of room changes possible. In each room, you need to decide the direction to go in. Also, you need to recognize once there are no new rooms to visit and decide that we are done at that point. Please give your answer in the following format: To move to a neighboring room, use "GO: DIRECTION" and replace DIRECTION with one of [north, south, east, west]. To stop the exploration, answer with "DONE" instead. Omit any other text.
Here is an example:
You are in the Kitchen. Currently available directions: south, west. What is your next instruction?
GO: west
You have made a step and entered a Lobby. Currently available directions: east, north. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
...
You have made a step and entered a Bedroom. Currently available directions: south. What is your next instruction?
DONE
Let us start. You are in the Media room. Currently available directions: north. What is your next instruction?

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Please help me with the following task. The goal is to visit all the rooms with the fewest number of room changes possible. In each room, you need to decide the direction to go in. Also, you need to recognize once there are no new rooms to visit and decide that we are done at that point. Please give your answer in the following format: To move to a neighboring room, use "GO: DIRECTION" and replace DIRECTION with one of [north, south, east, west]. To stop the exploration, answer with "DONE" instead. Omit any other text.
Here is an example:
You are in the Kitchen. Currently available directions: south, west. What is your next instruction?
GO: west
You have made a step and entered a Lobby. Currently available directions: east, north. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
...
You have made a step and entered a Bedroom. Currently available directions: south. What is your next instruction?
DONE
Let us start. You are in the Media room. Currently available directions: north. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
You have made a step and entered Balcony. Currently available directions: north, south, west. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
You have made a step and entered Billiard room. Currently available directions: south. What is your next instruction?
GO: south
You have made a step and entered Balcony. Currently available directions: north, south, west. What is your next instruction?
GO: west
You have made a step and entered Guest room. Currently available directions: north, west, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
You have made a step and entered Mudroom. Currently available directions: south. What is your next instruction?
GO: south
You have made a step and entered Guest room. Currently available directions: north, west, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: west
You have made a step and entered Craft room. Currently available directions: north, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
You have made a step and entered Utility room. Currently available directions: south, west. What is your next instruction?
GO: west
You have made a step and entered Home office. Currently available directions: east. What is your next instruction?
GO: east
You have made a step and entered Utility room. Currently available directions: south, west. What is your next instruction?
GO: south
You have made a step and entered Craft room. Currently available directions: north, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: east
You have made a step and entered Guest room. Currently available directions: north, west, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: east
You have made a step and entered Balcony. Currently available directions: north, south, west. What is your next instruction?
GO: south
You have made a step and entered Media room. Currently available directions: north. What is your next instruction?

message.reasoning:
We need to explore all rooms with minimal room changes, i.e., a traversal that visits all rooms without revisiting unnecessarily. We need to detect when all rooms have been visited. We must keep track of visited rooms. So far visited sequence:

Start Media room, then north -> Balcony, north -> Billiard room, south -> Balcony, west -> Guest room, north -> Mudroom, south -> Guest room, west -> Craft room, north -> Utility room, west -> Home office, east -> Utility room, south -> Craft room, east -> Guest room, east -> Balcony, south -> Media room (back to start). So visited rooms: Media room, Balcony, Billiard room, Guest room, Mudroom, Craft room, Utility room, Home office. Are there any other rooms not visited? Possibly some rooms not yet seen like Kitchen, Lobby, Bedroom, etc., but not sure if part of the map. We need to continue exploring from Media room (north only). The only direction from Media room is north, leading back to Balcony (already visited). But there may be other rooms not yet visited reachable via other paths we haven't explored.

We need to continue exploring unvisited branches. From Media room north to Balcony again, then we can explore other directions from Balcony that we haven't taken: currently at Balcony we have north, south, west. We have taken north earlier (to Billiard), west earlier (to Guest). We haven't taken south from Balcony (south leads back to Media, which we just came from). Actually from Balcony south leads to Media, which we've just visited. So all directions from Balcony visited: north, west, south all visited (south leads to Media). So we've exhausted Balcony.

Now from Media we can only go north to return to Balcony, which we've visited and all its exits visited. So seems we have fully explored region containing those rooms.

But maybe there are other rooms reachable from other places we haven't visited, like maybe from Guest room there is east (we took east to Balcony), north (to Mudroom), west (to Craft). That covers all.

From Utility room we have south (to Craft) and west (to Home office). Did we go east? No east from Utility not listed (south, west). So done.

From Home office only east (back to Utility). Done.

From Billiard room only south (to Balcony). Done.

Thus all rooms reachable from start have been visited. So we can stop. Answer DONE.
